_comment: HESO/1 crown-jewel conformance vectors (P1 absorption). Generated by vectors/generate_vectors.py — do not hand-edit. See that file's header for the per-vector provenance contract.

cases.desc: gated L1 receipt: operator + distinct approver co-signature
signed field mutated after action_hash was stamped
plat envelope alg on an action receipt
seq2 re-pointed at genesis (predecessor spliced out)
wrong salt must NOT reproduce the commitment

redaction.merkle_root_rule: BLAKE3 over each commitment hex followed by '\n'

consistency.source: RFC-6962 §2.1.2 over the published CT leaves (transparency.md §5)

taxonomy_classify.absent_row_count_semantics: absent row_count_estimate is NO-match for row_threshold; observed unknown row count is row_count_unknown=true and fails safe to bulk_data

cases.desc: observed but indeterminate row count fails safe into bulk_data
a payment host that is also a network reach classifies as payment (priority)
well-known payment host comes from the heso/payment-providers extension pack
well-known identity host comes from the heso/identity-providers extension pack
well-known secret host comes from the heso/secret-stores extension pack
well-known model host comes from the heso/model-providers extension pack
well-known messaging host comes from the heso/messaging-providers extension pack

time_anchor.source: trusted-time anchor pre-image (receipt.rs anchored_content_hash; verify.rs outcomes)
